scenarios.description: load() with a valid .env file and systemProperties=false returns DotenvImpl without setting any System properties
scenarios.precondition: A file named .env exists in working directory containing two entries A=1 and B=2; no relevant system properties set
scenarios.expectedResult: Dotenv.entries(filter) yields two entries; System.getProperty("A") and System.getProperty("B") remain null
pseudocode: TEST TC06 load with file and no systemProperties

scenarios.description: load() with missing .env file and ignoreIfMissing() returns empty Dotenv without exception
scenarios.precondition: No .env file present; throwIfMissing=false via ignoreIfMissing()
scenarios.expectedResult: Dotenv.entries(filter) yields empty set; no exception thrown
pseudocode: TEST TC07 load missing file with ignoreIfMissing

scenarios.description: load() with a malformed .env entry and ignoreIfMalformed() returns DotenvImpl containing only well-formed entries
scenarios.precondition: A file named .env exists containing malformed line "BADLINE" and valid line "KEY=VAL"; throwIfMalformed=false
scenarios.expectedResult: Dotenv.entries(filter) yields one entry KEY=VAL; no exception thrown
pseudocode: TEST TC08 load with malformed file and ignoreIfMalformed
